name: Button
description: Reusable button component with semantic color variants, sizes, and active/disabled states. Uses Svelte 5 runes ($props).
responsibilities: Render a styled button with variant-based coloring (default, positive, negative, warning, info, neutral)
Support sm/md/lg sizes and an active toggle state
Accept an onclick callback and render child content via Snippet

name: Card
description: Reusable card container with surface variants, accent border colors, hoverable click support, and configurable padding/gap.
responsibilities: Render a styled card container with default/surface/ghost variants
Apply accent border colors (green, amber, red, purple, blue, teal, draco)
Support optional click handling with role='button' and keyboard accessibility
Accept children via Snippet

name: Divider
description: Simple horizontal rule divider with color variants and configurable vertical spacing.
responsibilities: Render a styled <hr> element
Apply color variants (green, amber, red, purple, blue, teal, draco)
Support none/sm/md/lg vertical spacing

name: ui/index
description: Barrel export file that re-exports all reusable UI components from the lib/ui directory.
responsibilities: Provide a single import point for all UI components (Card, Badge, Button, Stat, Section, Divider, Panel)

name: Panel
description: Prominent panel container with a gradient background, optional header slot, and color variants.
responsibilities: Render a gradient-background panel with rounded borders
Support optional header slot and children Snippet
Apply color variants (green, amber, red, purple, blue, teal) with tinted gradients
Support none/sm/md/lg padding

name: Section
description: Bordered section container with an uppercase header label or header slot, color variants, and configurable gap.
responsibilities: Render a bordered section with optional title or header Snippet
Display a styled uppercase header with bottom border separator
Apply color variants (green, amber, red, purple, blue, teal, draco) with tinted backgrounds
Support sm/md/lg gap spacing

name: Stat
description: Key-value stat display row with optional label, colored value, size variants, and hover support.
responsibilities: Render a horizontal label-value row for displaying stat information
Support color variants for the value (green, amber, red, purple, blue, teal)
Support sm/md/lg sizes and optional hover effect
Accept either a value string/number or child Snippet for the value slot

name: uiConstants
description: Defines UI color constants for damage types, tag groups, source types, enchant rarities, and negative stat colors, plus label maps for stats and tags.
responsibilities: Define UI_COLORS mapping semantic names to hex color values for damage types, tags, sources, and enchant rarities
Define SOURCE_LABELS mapping source type keys to display names
Define internal STAT_LABELS and TAG_LABELS mappings (not exported)

name: utils
description: Pure utility functions for multiplier math, warding debuff calculation, HTML escaping, search text highlighting, and proc chance calculation.
responsibilities: Calculate and round multiplier values from percentages
Compute warding debuff multiplier based on warding stat
Escape HTML special characters for safe rendering
Highlight matching text substrings for search UI (returns HTML string or structured parts)
Calculate actual proc chance given base chance, proc coefficient, and scaling type

name: main
description: Application entry point that bootstraps the Svelte app by mounting it to the DOM and injecting Vercel analytics.
responsibilities: Import and inject Vercel analytics for usage tracking
Mount the root App.svelte component to the #app DOM element
Import global app.css stylesheet

name: ModalSearchHeader
description: Composite modal header providing search input with autocomplete suggestions, tag filtering, stat/weapon-stat filtering, and optional sort mode buttons.
responsibilities: Render a titled modal header with search input and SuggestDrop autocomplete
Conditionally show TagFilter and StatFilter/WeaponStatFilter sub-components
Show sort mode buttons (Highest, Most Effective, Brawny) for armor comparison
Forward events from child components (select, toggle, clear, change, weaponStatFilterChange) to parent

name: MountIcon
description: Inline SVG icon component representing a mount (horse-like silhouette) with a blue-to-teal gradient fill.
responsibilities: Render a 128x128 SVG mount icon with configurable size prop
Use a unique gradient ID per instance to avoid SVG gradient collisions

name: ScalingBreakdownRow
description: Displays a single damage scaling breakdown row showing the damage type, scaling coefficient, boost percentage, and resulting contribution.
responsibilities: Render a grid row with damage type dot, scaling value, boost percentage, and contribution
Determine if the boost key is a percentage stat and format accordingly
Optionally round multipliers and show zero-boost placeholders

name: StatFilter
description: Collapsible filter panel for armor stats with positive/negative stat tabs, include/exclude toggle states, and sort mode selection.
responsibilities: Render a toggleable filter panel grouped by Boost/Defense/Utility stat categories
Support positive and negative stat tabs with separate active filter sets
Allow include/exclude cycling and removal of stat filters via chip interactions
Dispatch filter state and sort mode changes to parent

name: SuggestDrop
description: Dropdown autocomplete suggestion list for search inputs, showing labeled results with highlighted matching text.
responsibilities: Render an absolutely-positioned dropdown list of search suggestions
Display type labels (Name/Perk) and highlight matching query text in results
Dispatch a select event when a suggestion is clicked

name: TagFilter
description: Collapsible tag-based filter panel with grouped tags (Combat, Support, Status, Weapon Art/Rune, Special), selectable chips, and a summary bar.
responsibilities: Render a toggleable filter panel with tags grouped by category
Display active tag chips in a summary bar with remove-on-click
Filter out hidden tags (e.g., Stance Change for weapon modals)
Dispatch toggle and clear events to parent

name: WeaponStatFilter
description: Collapsible filter panel for weapon-specific stats organized into Damage Type, Scaling, and Boost/Stats groups with include/exclude toggle.
responsibilities: Render a toggleable filter panel with weapon stats grouped by DMG/Scaling/Boost
Support include/exclude cycling and removal of weapon stat filters
Expose a matchesFilter() method for parent components to test items against active filters
Dispatch filter state changes to parent

name: WeaponStatsDisplay
description: Read-only display component that splits a weapon's stats dictionary into damage types, scalings, and boosts, rendering each as styled pill groups.
responsibilities: Split weapon stats into damage type, scaling, and boost categories by key suffix
Render categorized stats as colored pill badges with formatted labels and values
Handle negative values with distinct styling

name: vite.config
description: Vite build configuration with Svelte plugin, PWA support (service worker, manifest), and configurable base path.
responsibilities: Configure Vite base path from VITE_BASE_PATH environment variable (default: /voxlblade-builder/)
Set up Svelte plugin for compilation
Configure VitePWA with auto-update registration, web app manifest, and workbox caching strategies
Set build output to single chunk (manualChunks: undefined)
